root_text.sn36.28:1.3: Sukhā vedanā, dukkhā vedanā, adukkhamasukhā vedanā.
root_text.sn36.28:1.4: Ye hi keci, bhikkhave, samaṇā vā brāhmaṇā vā imāsaṁ tissannaṁ vedanānaṁ samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ nappajānanti …pe…
root_text.sn36.28:1.5: pajānanti …pe… sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja viharantī”ti.

translation_text.sn36.28:0.2: 3. The Explanation of the Hundred and Eight
translation_text.sn36.28:1.4: There are ascetics and brahmins who don’t truly understand these three feelings’ origin, disappearance, gratification, drawback, and escape. …
translation_text.sn36.28:1.5: There are ascetics and brahmins who do truly understand …”
